sections.title: Purpose
sections.summary: Route current game-building context to the right hats, doctrine packs, and retrieval chunks so an assistant can give short, context-dependent feedback cheaply.

sections.title: Responsibilities
sections.summary: - inspect user intent and lightweight repo context - infer the relevant hats, capabilities, and architecture family - retrieve the smallest doctrine slices that matter - return a s

sections.title: Doctrine
sections.summary: `coach` is not the final voice. It is the context engine behind the voice. The operating rule is: - deep canon on disk - small retrieval packet at runtime - cheap model render by d

sections.title: Key Question
sections.summary: What is the smallest relevant doctrine packet that will make the assistant sound like a seasoned game team right now?
